description: As a clinical data analyst, verify that visit records are being properly stored in VistA. Every clinical encounter is recorded in the Visit file (^AUPNVSIT, File #9000010), which links the patient, provider, location, and time of service. Using the YDBGui web interface, navigate to the Visit global (^AUPNVSIT) and browse at least three visit entries (IENs) to view their details, such as date/time, patient link, and service category. Ensure the zero-node data for these entries is visible on the screen.
